mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_wallet_income(uuid, driver_id, amount, type, status, remark) VALUES (#{uuid}, #{driverId}, #{amount}, #{type}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT CAST(id AS CHAR) AS id, CAST(amount AS CHAR) AS amount, remark, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%H:%i:%s') AS time FROM tb_wallet_income WHERE driver_id = #{driverId} AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') = #{month} ORDER BY create_time DESC
